creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Per "[HEADS UP] Ports Feature Freeze for 9.1" (portmgr-secretary@ on
ports@), this PR constitutes a "normal upgrade" of a port that does not
have an "unusually high number of dependencies", and will therefore be
admissible without portmgr@ approval. In other words, it would be swell
if a committer would pick this up prior to the ports build pass for 9.1.

Cheers,
John
